narrative: Middle East escalation and rocket launches drive a geopolitical risk premium as USD/JPY stretches above 160.03; gold lower -1.20% near $4,466 while equities -0.44% retreat. Upbeat US data and a 292bp SOFR-TONA carry advantage sustain the USD bid, though a -1.18 moderate put skew in 25d RR suggests hedging against a JPY reversal. DXY +0.33% firms as VIX 16.1 rises. Watch the next BoC meeting.
